commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `wacrawl web` with a loopback HTTP server, embedded static UI, bearer-token archive APIs for status/chats/messages/search, docs, control metadata, tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR, not a report of broken existing behavior. I reviewed the diff, linked feature request, and current-main absence of the web command instead of reproducing a failure.
